full_text:
Dong Yu (Jizhi) 董遇 (季直)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Yu (董遇), styledJizhi (季直), was born in Hongnong. Loved to study and a quiet man, highly venerated Confucian scholar. Dong Yu was affiliated with Duan Wei and the Wei Kingdom.
